title: Ra`mah #7484
definition:
Raamah = "horse's mane"

 n pr m
 1) son of Cush and father of Sheba and Dedan

 n pr loc
 2) a home of traders
nasbUsage:
Definition: Raamah = "horse's mane"

 n pr m
 1) son of Cush and father of Sheba and Dedan

 n pr loc
 2) a home of traders

    NASB:  trembling, son of Cush, also a trading people
